rationale: Playwright spec mocks the 5 specified providers with per-provider model lists, asserts all 5 rows render with expected models (incl. truncation drilldown), and verifies the per-row refresh button drives a RefreshProviderModels mutation for both HARNESS and ENDPOINT kinds.

findings.summary: AC1 satisfied: GraphQL route mock returns 5 providers (claude/codex as HARNESS, openrouter/lmstudio @vidar/@bragi as ENDPOINT) with per-provider model lists in MODELS_BY_KEY.
AC2 satisfied: TC-068 iterates all 5 providers, asserts row visibility and expanded model list contains an expected model id.
AC3 satisfied: TC-069 clicks per-row refresh and asserts RefreshProviderModels mutation count increments with correct name/kind variables for both HARNESS and ENDPOINT rows.
